message:
feat(fnp-python): conformance_argwhere.rs harness (6 tests, 96 cases)

Tests native argwhere against NumPy oracle across:
- 50 1D arrays (all-nonzero, all-zero, mixed positions, floats, negatives)
- 22 2D arrays (returns Nx2 index arrays for row,col positions)
- 9 3D arrays (returns Nx3 index arrays)
- 10 dtype variants (int32, int64, uint8, float32, float64, bool_)
- Empty array edge case
- Large sparse arrays (zeros, ones, eye diagonal, modulo patterns)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
